_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Date | System | Status | Implication for the Workspace |
|---|---|---|---|
| 2005 | EU ETS (power/industry) | In force | Background; industrial emissions, not directly freight-relevant |
| 2012 | EU ETS aviation (intra-EEA) | In force | Air surcharges on Europe lanes: current cost |
| 2013 | California Cap-and-Trade | In force | Road/ocean carrier cost pass-through in California: current cost. Price: USD 29.10 (2025) |
| 2013 | Québec Cap-and-Trade | In force | Road carrier cost pass-through in Québec: current cost. Price: CAD 48.61 (2025) |
| 2015 | Korea K-ETS | In force | Air/road/ocean carrier pass-through on Korea lanes: current cost. Price: USD 6.60 (2025) |
| 2021 | UK ETS | In force | Air + maritime + industrial. Carrier pass-through on UK routes: current cost. Price: GBP 50.34 (2025) |
| 2021 | Germany National ETS | In force | Road transport fuel covered. Carrier pass-through in Germany: current cost. Price: EUR 55 fixed (2025) |
| 2022 | Austria National ETS | In force | Road transport fuel covered. Carrier pass-through in Austria: current cost. Price: EUR 55 fixed through 2027 |
| 2023 | Washington Cap-and-Invest | In force | Road + transport covered. Highest sub-national Americas price: USD 61.36 (2025). Current cost on Pacific Northwest road movements |
| 2024 | EU ETS Maritime (Phase 1, 50%) | In force | Ocean carrier pass-through to EU ports: current cost. Price: EUR 74.35 (2025) |
| 2025 | Japan GX-ETS | In force | Air, maritime, transport covered. Pass-through on Japan lanes: current cost. Price: not published in available data |
| 2025 | India Carbon Credit Trading Scheme | In force | Industry scope. Price: not published in available data |
| 2026 | Germany National ETS | Transitioning | Fixed price (EUR 55) gives way to auctioning with price corridor. Cost to road carriers in Germany will become market-driven. Monitor |
| 2026 | EU ETS Maritime (Phase 2 — 100%) | In force (expected phase schedule) | Ocean carrier pass-through increases to 100% of covered voyage emissions. Cost increase expected for EU-port ocean shipments. **COST ALERT** |
| TBD | EU ETS 2 (road transport) | Under development | Will add road transport fuel carbon cost across all EU/EEA states. Interaction with Germany/Austria national systems: **Legal Confirmation Required** |
| TBD | New York NYCI | Under development | Will add transport carbon cost in New York — key market for live events, fine art, luxury goods, film and TV |
| TBD | Brazilian ETS | Under development | Will add maritime + transport carbon cost on Brazil trade lanes |
| TBD | Turkey ETS | Under development | Will affect carrier costs on Turkey corridors within Europe trade lane |

*Source: All timeline entries derived from ICAP ETS Map, ICAP, 2025–2026. https://icapcarbonaction.com/en/ets.*

---
